title: Steamed Italian Collard Greens
description: A simple and healthy side dish that combines the flavors of Italy with the nutritional benefits of collard greens.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil.
Add 1 tablespoon of salt to the water.
Rinse the collard greens in cold water, then chop them into 1-inch pieces.
Pack the collard greens into a steamer basket.
Steam the collard greens for 5-7 minutes, or until they are tender.
While the collard greens are steaming, mix together the garlic, lemon juice, and olive oil in a small bowl.
Once the collard greens are done steaming, remove them from the heat and sprinkle with the garlic-lemon mixture.
Season the collard greens with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the steamed collard greens hot.
